category_sources: source_facts.description says this is a C library for controlling SiliconDust HDHomeRun TV tuners; official SiliconDust pages document HDHomeRun devices and APIs: https://www.silicondust.com/support/linux
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is libhdhomerun; official source archive and GitHub project use libhdhomerun: https://github.com/Silicondust/libhdhomerun
docs_sources: Official SiliconDust Linux support page is source_facts.homepage; official SiliconDust API PDFs cover discovery and development APIs.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official SiliconDust documentation and HDHomeRun API materials reference https://github.com/Silicondust/libhdhomerun.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies SiliconDust HDHomeRun TV tuner control; source_facts.executables includes hdhomerun_config; official SiliconDust support and API docs cover HDHomeRun device control.
